item.title: Bajaj Finance Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure on 11 Mar 2026
item.description: Bajaj Finance Ltd experienced a notable intraday decline on 11 Mar 2026, touching a low of Rs 906.45, reflecting a 3.59% drop from previous levels. The stock underperformed its sector and broader market indices amid widespread bearish sentiment and technical pressures. Time: 13 minutes ago

item.title: TVS Motor Company Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure on 11 Mar 2026
item.description: Shares of TVS Motor Company Ltd declined sharply on 11 Mar 2026, touching an intraday low of Rs 3,665, reflecting a 3.18% drop as the stock underperformed both its sector and the broader market amid prevailing bearish sentiment. Time: 13 minutes ago

item.title: Bajaj Finserv Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure on 11 Mar 2026
item.description: Bajaj Finserv Ltd experienced a notable decline today, touching an intraday low of ₹1,817.15, reflecting persistent price pressure amid a broadly weak market environment. The stock underperformed its sector and key indices, continuing a trend of subdued performance over recent weeks. Time: 13 minutes ago

item.title: Axis Bank Ltd. Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure on 11 Mar 2026
item.description: Axis Bank Ltd. experienced a notable decline in intraday trading on 11 Mar 2026, touching a low of Rs 1,273.95, down 3.13% from the previous close. The stock underperformed its sector and broader market indices amid widespread selling pressure and a bearish market environment. Time: 13 minutes ago

item.title: Sona BLW Precision Forgings Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Bullish Market Momentum
item.description: Sona BLW Precision Forgings Ltd (SONACOMS) has witnessed a notable surge in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling increased market participation and potential directional bets. The stock outperformed its sector and broader indices, supported by rising volumes and improving investor sentiment, prompting a reassessment of its market positioning and outlook. Time: 14 minutes ago

item.title: Shyam Century Ferrous Ltd Hits Upper Circuit Amid Strong Buying Pressure
item.description: Shyam Century Ferrous Ltd, a micro-cap player in the ferrous metals sector, surged to hit its upper circuit limit on 11 Mar 2026, reflecting robust buying interest and a maximum daily gain of 5%. This price action comes despite a challenging market backdrop, underscoring renewed investor optimism in the stock. Time: 14 minutes ago

item.title: Dalmia Bharat Ltd Sees Significant Open Interest Surge Amid Mixed Technical Signals
item.description: Dalmia Bharat Ltd has witnessed a notable 10.9% increase in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity and shifting investor positioning. Despite the stock’s recent outperformance relative to its sector, technical indicators and fundamental scores suggest a cautious outlook for investors navigating the cement sector’s evolving landscape. Time: 14 minutes ago

item.title: Ceinsys Tech Ltd Surges to Upper Circuit on Robust Buying Momentum
item.description: Ceinsys Tech Ltd, a small-cap player in the Computers - Software & Consulting sector, witnessed a remarkable surge on 11 Mar 2026, hitting its upper circuit limit with a 16.39% gain. The stock closed at ₹1,014.20, just 4.36% shy of its 52-week high of ₹1,061.70, driven by strong buying pressure and significant trading volumes amid a broadly negative market backdrop. Time: 14 minutes ago

item.title: Future Lifestyle Fashions Ltd Surges to Upper Circuit Amid Strong Buying Pressure
item.description: Future Lifestyle Fashions Ltd (stock ID: 226533) surged to hit its upper circuit limit on 11 Mar 2026, registering a maximum daily gain of 4.92% to close at ₹1.28. This sharp rally was driven by robust buying interest despite the stock’s micro-cap status and a prevailing strong sell rating, highlighting a notable shift in market sentiment within the diversified retail sector. Time: 14 minutes ago

item.title: Winsome Yarns Ltd Hits Upper Circuit Amid Strong Buying Pressure
item.description: Shares of Winsome Yarns Ltd surged to hit the upper circuit price limit on 11 Mar 2026, reflecting robust buying interest despite the company’s challenging fundamentals and a recent downgrade in its mojo grade. The stock outperformed its sector and the broader market, signalling a notable shift in investor sentiment within the Garments & Apparels industry. Time: 14 minutes ago

item.title: HMT Ltd Hits Lower Circuit Amid Heavy Selling Pressure and Panic Selling
item.description: Shares of HMT Ltd, a key player in the Industrial Manufacturing sector, plunged to their lower circuit limit on 11 Mar 2026, closing at ₹59.35, marking a maximum daily loss of 4.99%. The stock’s sharp decline reflects intense selling pressure and panic among investors, with volumes concentrated near the day’s low and a significant drop in delivery volumes signalling waning investor participation. Time: 14 minutes ago

item.title: KEI Industries Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Mixed Price Action
item.description: KEI Industries Ltd has witnessed a notable 13.5% increase in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity despite the stock’s recent underperformance. This surge in open interest, coupled with volume patterns and price movements, offers insights into evolving market positioning and potential directional bets among investors. Time: 14 minutes ago

item.title: Astral Ltd Sees Significant Open Interest Surge Amid Strong Price Momentum
item.description: Astral Ltd, a key player in the Plastic Products - Industrial sector, has witnessed a notable surge in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling increased market participation and potential directional bets. The stock’s recent price action, coupled with rising volumes and improved investor sentiment, suggests a bullish undertone that merits close attention from traders and investors alike. Time: 14 minutes ago

item.title: HDFC Bank Sees Heavy Call Option Activity Amid Bearish Price Momentum
item.description: HDFC Bank Ltd., a leading private sector bank, has witnessed a notable spike in call option trading activity despite the stock’s recent underperformance. With the underlying share price hovering near its 52-week low and trading below all major moving averages, investors appear to be positioning themselves for a potential rebound ahead of the 30 March 2026 expiry. Time: 14 minutes ago

item.title: Laxmi Cotspin Ltd Hits Lower Circuit Amid Heavy Selling Pressure
item.description: Shares of Laxmi Cotspin Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Garments & Apparels sector, plunged to their lower circuit limit on 11 Mar 2026, registering a maximum daily loss of 4.95%. The sharp decline reflects intense selling pressure and panic among investors, with the stock closing at ₹14.57 after hitting an intraday low of ₹13.26. Time: 14 minutes ago

item.title: Sensex Slumps Over 1,000 Points as Mid and Small Caps Show Mixed Trends
item.description: The Indian equity market witnessed a sharp correction on 11 Mar 2026, with the Sensex falling by 1.31% or 1,020.88 points to close at 77,185.10. While the benchmark index struggled below key moving averages, mid and small cap indices displayed mixed performances, reflecting a nuanced market sentiment amid global and domestic factors. Time: 14 minutes ago

item.title: Mid-Cap Segment Sees Mild Correction Amid Mixed Technical Upgrades
item.description: The mid-cap segment experienced a subdued session on 11 Mar 2026, with the BSE Midcap 150 index declining by 0.28% amid a broader market pullback. Despite the recent five-day slide of 1.29%, select stocks within the segment demonstrated resilience, supported by technical upgrades and sectoral rotations. This report analyses the mid-cap index movement, sectoral contributors, breadth, and recent technical developments shaping investor sentiment. Time: 14 minutes ago

item.title: Large-Cap Segment Faces Broad Decline Amid Defensive and Cyclical Divergence
item.description: The large-cap segment, represented by the BSE 100 index, has experienced notable weakness over recent sessions, with a decline of 1.07% on the day and a sharper 2.91% drop over the past five days. This downturn reflects a broader market rotation, where defensive stocks have underperformed cyclical sectors, leading to a mixed performance among heavyweight constituents. Time: 14 minutes ago

item.title: Small-Cap Segment Shows Resilience with Moderate Gains and Positive Technical Upgrades
item.description: The small-cap segment, as measured by the BSE SMALLCAP 250 index, demonstrated modest gains of 0.39% on 11 Mar 2026, maintaining its position as one of the best-performing market segments amid a mixed sectoral backdrop and encouraging breadth indicators. While select stocks delivered robust returns, others faced headwinds, reflecting the nuanced dynamics within this market category. Time: 14 minutes ago

item.title: Anik Industries Ltd Stock Falls to 52-Week Low Amidst Weak Fundamentals
item.description: Anik Industries Ltd has recently touched a new 52-week low, closing just 2.99% above its lowest price of Rs 40.3. This marks a significant decline for the stock, which has underperformed the broader market and its sector peers over the past year. Time: 19 minutes ago
